title: Opening for Category Manager at Croma Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Croma Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Croma Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Croma Holdings Services:
Croma Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma Holdings Services!
